Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration (Ccp 1281.2) And Request For Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: STEPHEN JAFFE, ESQ., 415.618.0100, FOR PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE OCENAS.
JENNIFER WALT, ESQ., 415.433.1940, FOR DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE'S Motion To Compel Arbitration (Ccp 1281.2) And Request For Stay Of Proceedings IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
